steps.title: Translate equivalent ratios into a proportion
steps.content:
The ratio 5 to x is equivalent to the ratio y to 8. When two ratios are equivalent, we can express them as a proportion:
$$\frac{5}{x} = \frac{y}{8}$$

steps.title: Cross-multiply to solve for x
steps.content:
To solve for x, cross-multiply the proportion. Multiply both sides by x and 8:
$$5 \cdot 8 = y \cdot x$$
$$40 = xy$$
Divide both sides by y:
$$x = \frac{40}{y}$$
This matches choice D — D is correct.
